title: Hut 8 Corp. (HUT) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts - Yahoo Finance
text: HUT Analyst Coverage on Yahoo Finance. Comprehensive analyst coverage and ratings for Hut 8. 18 Wall Street analysts covering the stock. Moderate Buy consensus. Price target range $30-$156. Recent analyst actions from Jefferies, B. Riley, Canaccord, Needham. EPS estimates and revenue forecasts. Price target evolution reflecting AI data center deal impact.
